title: Cozy Creations
body:
![Cozy Creations project banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Z59n1S3Y/images/4a7d106a0ad2175f267df74b49653d01431c73f3.png)

## ℹ️  Introduction

Cozy Creations is a Create-based modpack, focusing on making the game feel as cozy as possible!

When this project was created, it was originally going to be a personal pack for a couple of my friends, but it ended up turning into an actual project being made available for others as well.

## ⁉️ Known Issues
- [World Host](https://modrinth.com/mod/world-host) is currently incompatible with voice chat mods like [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat). This is because of [a limitation of World Host](https://github.com/Gaming32/world-host/issues/34), but it may be supported in the future.
- If you're setting up a server for this modpack, due to a limitation of [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat), you'll have to make sure you have your server host configured for the mod [here](https://modrepo.de/minecraft/voicechat/wiki/troubleshooting). If you don't want to use Simple Voice Chat, feel free to ignore this!

## 📋️ License

Cozy Creations is licensed under the [MIT License](https://github.com/LilydevMC/CozyCreations/blob/main/LICENSE). Feel free use this pack in anything you see fit!
